title: Maim
description: A brutal enchantment that sacrifices attack speed for devastating critical damage and crippling slowness.
body:
Maim introduces a new high-risk, high-reward enchantment designed for axes and swords. It sacrifices your attack speed to increase critical damage and inflict slowness on your targets. Perfect for players who prefer one lethal blow over rapid weak strikes.

Features:

🪓 Maim Enchantment massively increases critical hit damage (+25% per level, configurable) at the cost of attack speed (-12.5% per level, configurable).

🐌 Critical hits apply slowness making it impossible for enemies to escape.

🩸 Satisfying custom particle effects on critical hits.

👀 The mod automatically calculates and displays your exact critical damage and modified attack speed on the item tooltip.

⚙️ Adjust the damage multiplier, speed penalty, and slowness duration to fit your modpack's balance.
